data.title: Two Peking University alumni awarded Fields Medals, 14 PKUers speak at the 2026 ICM
data.description: On July 23, 2026, the 2026 International Congress of Mathematicians began in Philadelphia, USA. Peking University alumni Wang Hong and Deng Yu were honored with the 2026 Fields Medals, a top recognition in mathematics.

data.title: Zoomlion Strengthens Global Customer Support During Challenging Summer Conditions
data.description: On July 24, 2026 in Changsha, China, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. has been providing assistance to customers with their engineering cranes and construction hoisting machinery. The service teams, operating across various product lines, have been dedicated to supporting clients.

data.title: Valmet's Half Year Financial Review January-June 2026 Net sales and Comparable EBITA increased in the second quarter
data.description: Valmet Oyj issued a stock exchange announcement on July 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland. In the April-June 2026 period, orders received by the company saw a 10 percent decline to EUR 1,373 million, down from EUR 1,520 million. The organic decrease in orders received was 9 percent. data.title: Temu partners with the Schweizerischer KMU Verband to help Swiss businesses sell online
data.description: A recent collaboration has been formed to provide Swiss small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) with a pathway to access Temu's marketplace, along with valuable assistance in transitioning to the digital realm. This initiative, announced on July 24, 2026, in HÜNENBERG, Switzerland, aims to support local businesses in establishing an online presence. Through this partnership, SMEs in Switzerland stand to benefit from gaining entry to a global e-commerce platform, facilitating their online sales efforts.

data.title: Bears dominate MATIC, $0.31 likely unless $0.43 is regained soon. Overhead resistance at $0.38, volume under $1M signals slow bleed.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon is currently trading at $0.38, facing significant resistance from key moving averages. The trading volume remains low, struggling to surpass $1 million. This stagnant situation indicates a slow decline rather than accumulation of assets.

data.title: DOGE may reach $0.065 amid conflicting indicators: price stuck at $0.07, rising long positions, but decreasing open interest and bearish outlook persist.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOGE is currently at $0.07, staying close to the lower Bollinger Band. Both retail investors and institutional investors are increasingly opting for long positions. However, open interest is declining, and the overall market trend continues to be bearish. This situation may lead to a potential squeeze in the market.

data.title: SOL price at $76.19, primed for a breakout with top traders 74% long. Potential target: $79-$81 soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SOL is currently valued at $76.19, poised for a potential upward movement as indicated by a pre-directional compression pattern. The MACD momentum has reached zero, signaling a possible trend reversal. Additionally, 74% of top traders have taken long positions. If the price surpasses $77.61, the next targets are set between $79 to $81 by the end of the week.

data.title: Will ADA explode past $0.18? Momentum flat at $0.168, 70% long - setting up for short squeeze or collapse.
data.description: The current price of ADA stands at $0.168 with stagnant momentum. More than 70% of retail and smart investors have taken long positions. This scenario may lead to a short squeeze above $0.18 or a potential collapse.

data.title: XRP price stagnates at $1.12. Retail traders are 72.5% long. Anticipating a decisive move above $1.14 in 24-48 hrs.
data.description: XRP is currently maintaining stability at its pivot point, showcasing a MACD indicator at zero and indicating a potential setup for a short squeeze with 72.5% of retail traders holding long positions. The next 24 to 48 hours will determine whether there will be a significant breakthrough above $1.14 or a potential downturn in the market.

data.title: BNB price at $561 may break coiling setup, with sellers currently dominating; MACD frozen at zero.
data.description: Currently, BNB is showing a textbook compression setup at a price of $571, with the MACD indicator stagnant at zero. Additionally, all short-term moving averages are positioned above, acting as resistance levels. The market is currently favoring sellers in this situation, indicating a downward trend at the moment.

data.title: ETH faces a critical resistance level at $1,929-$1,966. Momentum is stagnant with 69% long positions. Violent price action expected.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) is currently consolidating below a crucial resistance zone between $1,929 and $1,966. The momentum has plateaued, indicated by a classic MACD turning point, suggesting an imminent surge in price. Further, retail investors are heavily skewed towards long positions, with 69% holding bullish bets. This setup typically leads to a sharp and dramatic price movement.

data.title: BTC struggles at $65,484 near $66,000 resistance. MACD flatlining, $66,500 crucial. Buyers under pressure.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is currently consolidating at $65,484, just below a strong resistance range of $65,967–$66,451. The MACD momentum indicator is registering at zero, indicating a potential lack of directional bias. Additionally, sellers seem to be more active than buyers as indicated by taker sell volume surpassing buyer volume. However, there is still potential for bullish momentum to push through the resistance levels.

data.title: AVAX price struggling at $6.27, facing resistance with $23.3M token unlock. Predicted drop to $5.94 before recovery.
data.description: AVAX is currently trading at $6.27, facing resistance from multiple moving averages above. Additionally, a significant token unlock worth $23.3 million is causing selling pressure. The prevailing market sentiment suggests a downward trend in the short term before a potential uptrend.
